intro.p1: We help small businesses bring ideas to life — from iOS/Android apps to online platforms. We handle the backend so you can focus on what matters: your customers.
intro.p2: All apps and sites run under SourceGrid Labs — so there's no need to set up your own infrastructure or accounts.

items.simple: ✔️ Simple mobile or web app creation
items.no_accounts: ✔️ No need to deal with Apple/Google developer accounts
items.backend: ✔️ Backend support powered by Rails & Sidekiq — automation, alerts, reports
items.pricing: ✔️ Fixed setup fee + scalable monthly hosting based on your needs

contact.p: If you're a small business looking to simplify your operations or bring a digital idea to life, email us at {email} to learn more.
